title: Inhibitors of the pd-1/pd-l1 protein/protein interaction
abstract: The present invention provides novel compounds of formula (I) that are useful as inhibitors of the PD-1/PD-L1 protein/protein interaction. The compounds may be used in the treatment of cancer, infectious diseases and neurodegenerative diseases such as schizophrenia, Alzheimer, multiple sclerosis or Parkinson.
claims:

A pharmaceutical composition comprising a compound according to anyone of the preceding claims or a pharmaceutically acceptable ester, prodrug, hydrate,

A compound or a pharmaceutical composition according to anyone of the preceding claims for use in the treatment of cancer, viral diseases and infectious diseases and neurodegenerative diseases such as Schizophrenia, Alzheimer, Multiples Sclerosis, Parkinson, Corea Huntington, Spinocerebellar ataxia type 1 (SCA1) , Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, Batten disease.
